---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Ordo
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case

A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve, or the use case this feature would address.

Example: _"I'm always frustrated when I can't [...] from the mobile app."_

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Odoo Context

If applicable, describe how this feature works in Odoo web for reference.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or other context about the feature request.
